title: Fix the Mistake: Even or Odd Number

statement.markdown:
A function `isEven` takes an integer `n` as input and determines if it's even or odd. However, it doesn't handle negative numbers correctly.

Your task is to fix the function to handle negative numbers correctly.

hints.text: Even numbers always have a remainder of 0 when divided by 2, while odd numbers have a remainder of 1.

editorial.title: Fix the Mistake: Even or Odd Number
editorial.intuition: Correctly identify even and odd numbers, including handling of negative numbers.
editorial.bruteForce: Check every number from 0 to n to see if n is even or odd.
editorial.optimalSolution: Correctly handle negative numbers by taking their absolute value before checking if they are even.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: If n is negative, its absolute value will be even if and only if the original number n was even.
editorial.dryRun: Test with negative numbers to ensure correct handling.
